title: (NE2A)New Era To Alpha
description: Time to back into alpha , indev or something like arg
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c4796e3f8527d831adff3bc24105a36e61fde50.png)
### ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤTimeBack to alpha

## what change?
- make game old!
- change pvp mechanic 
- disable sprint(not full)
- change generation
  


## What to Expect:

This isn't just a visual throwback; it's an experience. We've imported the iconic elements, the simpler terrains, the old crafting recipes, and the distinctive look of versions like Indev and Infdev into the modern game engine.

# The Myth Lives On...

And of course, no tribute to this era would be complete without its most enduring myth. The modpack carefully weaves in the myth of **Herobrine**.

> Experience the subtle, unnerving signs of his presence, just as the original stories and forum posts described. Was it a Player in the SinglePlayer, a shared hallucination, or something more? The mystery is yours to uncover.
